title: T-023 — API: Routing cost preview (GET /api/technical/items/:code/routings/:v/cost-preview)
prompt: Implement GET endpoint computing routing cost preview per §12.4 TEC-062. Inputs: routing version, expected volume (query param). Output: per-op cost = setup_time_min/60 * cost_per_hour + (run_time_per_unit_sec * volume / 3600) * cost_per_hour, plus total. Currency from organizations.currency. Org-scoped. RED tests/api/routing-cost-preview.test.ts. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/api/routing-cost-preview.test.ts`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Routing cost preview endpoint summing setup + run × volume × cost_per_hour.
pipeline_inputs.details: Single SQL query with arithmetic, returns array of operations + total. No write side effects.
acceptance_criteria: Given routing with one op (setup=30 min, run=10 sec, cost=60/h) and volume=100, when GET, then op_cost = 30 + 16.67 ≈ 46.67 (within 0.01).
Given missing volume param, when GET, then 422.
Given cross-org request, when GET, then 404 (RLS).
test_strategy: RED tests for arithmetic precision + RLS.
risk_red_lines: Do not write to any table — read-only.
